_meta.boundary_note: 2011 figures are boundary-aligned to 2022 boundaries per Stats SA official publications. Direct 2011–2022 comparison is valid.
_meta.quality_caveat: Census 2022 Post-Enumeration Survey estimated ~30% undercount. Statistics South Africa considers the data fit for general use.
_meta.excluded_themes_reason: Formally excluded by the Statistician-General (August 2024) due to reporting and coverage biases.
_meta.erratum: Thaba Chweu (MP325) and City of Mbombela (MP322) figures corrected in August 2025 revision of the Municipal Fact Sheet.
